title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF CORVALLIS HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping develop healthy relationships. 1112 NW Circle Boulevard Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 Hours: 7:30am-5:30pm Email (541) 757-1909 214 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 757-1909 Main phone Main phone (541) 757-1909 ext 214 Athletic Director Todd Dorothy [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by program. Scholarships may be available DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located next to Linus Pauling Middle School and Osborn Aquatic Center Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
